faq.title: Questions answered
faq.subtitle: Before you pick up the phone

items.q: Do you charge a call-out fee?
items.a: No — we don't charge to come out and look at a job. You only pay for the work that gets done, and every non-emergency visit comes with a free quote.

Yes. Kris is Gas Safe registered (number 657768) — fully certified to work on all domestic gas appliances including boilers, hobs, cookers and fires. You can verify the registration at gassaferegister.co.uk.

items.q: Do you cover emergencies like burst pipes or no hot water?
items.a: Yes — same-day response for genuine emergencies across Colchester, Essex and the surrounding towns. Burst pipes, heating breakdowns, blocked drains and leaks. Call direct on 07549 251073 and we'll get to you as quickly as we can.

items.q: How much does a new boiler cost?
items.a: A straightforward combi boiler swap typically starts from around £2,200 including installation, and a full system upgrade can run to £4,000–£5,500+ depending on the property. Every job is quoted for free after a site visit — no generic pricing.

We're based in Colchester and cover Ipswich, Braintree, Witham, Chelmsford, Clacton, Harwich, Manningtree, Sudbury, Halstead, Tiptree and Wivenhoe as standard. If you're outside that list, give us a call — we're flexible on travel for the right job.
Yes — seven days a week, 7am to 10pm, with priority given to emergency call-outs. Evening and weekend rates are the same as weekday rates.
